Features

MeshWave is a decentralized cloud computing platform that provides a variety of features to support your workloads.

AI/ML Support

MeshWave is built to support AI/ML workloads. We provide optimized environments for popular frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and more.

Cloud Mining

The GPU machines on MeshWave can be used for cloud mining cryptocurrencies. There are no restrictions on the type of mining.

CI/CD Integration

All GPU nodes have integration with gitlab CI/CD. You can use the nodes to build and test your code and run production builds.

Data Storage

We provide a secure and distributed storage system for your data. So you won't struggle with data management.

Audit & KYC

Your funds are secured with MeshWave. We have undergone a security audit and KYC verification to ensure the safety of your assets.

Audit & KYC

The MeshWave token is audited by SolidProof and has passed the KYC verification process by FreshCoins.

No critical issues found
No high severity issues found
No medium severity issues found
KYC id verification
KYC portrait video verification
View AuditView KYC

Ecosystem

MeshWave has a growing ecosystem of products and services that are designed to work together to provide a seamless experience for our users.

Pipeline Runner

Runs your pipelines on GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, or any other.

MeshWave Cloud

Hyper-fast, secure, and reliable cloud storage for your data.

VPG

Virtual Private GPU that can be used for running tough tasks.

MeshWave AI Balancer

Load balancer that can distribute tasks across multiple GPUs automatically.

Cloud Miner

A simple GUI to mine cryptocurrencies on the cloud.

GPU Mesh

Pay for power, not for hardware. Rent GPU hash power instead of VPGs.

Checkout our major milestones for the future of MeshWave.

Bootstrap

Research and Development

Tokenomics

MeshWave has a unique tokenomics model that is designed to reward long-term holders and incentivize network participation.

Distribution

The MeshWave token is distributed for various activities such as staking, providing liquidity, and participating in the network.

Total Supply100,000,000
Initial liquidity90%
Rewards10%

Taxation

As we do not have any tokens for the team, we have a 5% tax on buy and sell transactions to fund the development and marketing.

Revenue Sharing1%
Development2%
Marketing2%
